- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New exporter / data type

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] Ran export against a Classic Central instance
- [ ] Ran import against a target Classic Central instance

- [ ] Docker build passes locally (`docker compose build`)
- [ ] CI passes

## Checklist

- [ ] No credentials or exported group data included in the diff
- [ ] `exports/` changes are limited to `.gitkeep` only
- [ ] DOCS.md updated if behaviour changed
